title: Onigashima Moves Toward the Climax
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Marco, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It may look pathetic to keep struggling with tears and shot running down my face, but I don't care!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never stop clinging to life!! You have to keep going,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it's in disgrace!! Dying after coming this far would be a waste!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not enough to just fight in this raid, you idiots!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: gyaaah!! I can't hold them off!!

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: He's a former Whitebeard Division Leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw Marco on the Live Floor earlier, what's happening?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! I don't know who you are, but thanks for saving me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Speaking will aggravate your wounds. There will be time to talk later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In "Straw hat" Luffy, you have to live on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll leave these guys to you then!! Let's go, Hamlet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The winner has already been decided!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this is what you want, so be it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fate was not on your side...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE FLAMES WILL REACH YOU FIRST!! I SHALL BE FREE AFTER YOU BURN TO DEATH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a loyal retainer to open- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fire this mild can't make me sweat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry, fuckurokuju!! We have to flee before the island blows up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My LORD, is something troubling you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, Komurasaki, play me that song!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
